data.body: Consideration: [Reliability] The plugin already enforces .tickets-tracker/ access guards at Claude tool-use time via pre-bash-functions.sh (hook_tickets_tracker_bash_guard), pre-edit-write-functions.sh (hook_tickets_tracker_guard), and review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh pattern k. check-tickets-boundary.sh adds a THIRD enforcement layer at commit time. Document the layering contract in the new hook's header: existing guards apply to in-session Claude tool-use actions; the new hook applies to committed source code. Verify no rule is admitted by one layer but rejected by another for the same allowlist entry — policy drift between the three layers produces confusing, hard-to-debug failures. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
